name: CLX - Sentinel Cost Collector OpenAI v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Cron 06:00 daily. Queries OpenAI Admin API for yesterday's organization usage. Requires OPENAI_ADMIN_API_KEY env var (starts with sk-admin-...). If key missing or 401, records $0 + sets data_source='manual' so Mary knows to enter monthly invoice manually.

parameters.url: ={{ 'https://api.openai.com/v1/organization/usage/completions?start_time=' + Math.floor(new Date(new Date(Date.now() - 86400000).toISOString().slice(0,10) + 'T00:00:00Z').getTime() / 1000) + '&end_time=' + Math.floor(new Date(new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10) + 'T00:00:00Z').getTime() / 1000) + '&bucket_width=1d' }}
